heading: Atlas Data Federation Query
body:
Atlas Data Federation can query data in an AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket or Azure Blob Storage
container and HTTP URL. To learn more about how to deploy and query a
federated database instance, see the following resources:

[Deploy a federated database instance](atlas/data-federation/tutorial/deploy)
[Query a federated database instance](atlas/data-federation/query/query-federated-database)
